records.ety: [Cf. F. extravagance. See Extravagant, and cf. Extravaganza.]

defs: A wandering beyond proper limits; an excursion or sally from the usual way, course, or limit.

The state of being extravagant, wild, or prodigal beyond bounds of propriety or duty; want of moderation; excess; especially, undue expenditure of money; void and superfluous expense; prodigality; as, extravagance of anger, love, expression, imagination, demands.
quotes: Some verses of my own, Maximin and Almanzor, cry vengeance on me for their extravagance.
The income of three dukes was enough to supply her extravagance.
